sqlMap.select: SELECT D.CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME END AS DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ( ((substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) OR (substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) ) AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = d.CN ORDER BY LPAD(IFNULL(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME END

SELECT company_id, tenant_id, work_starttime, work_endtime, closed_day, attitude_mod_appl, closed_date_attitude, DATE_FORMAT(conf_set_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS conf_set_date FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF SET work_starttime = #workStartTime#, work_endtime = #workEndTime#, closed_day = #closedDay#, attitude_mod_appl = #attitudeModAppl#, closed_date_attitude = #closedDateAttitude#, conf_set_date = str_to_date(#confSetDate#, '%Y-%m-%d') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.cn AS userid, IFNULL(SUBSTR(date_add(concat((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workstarttime, IFNULL(SUBSTR(date_add(concat((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workendtime, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_USERMASTER.title2 ELSE TBL_USERMASTER.title END AS usertitle, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_USERMASTER.displayname2 ELSE TBL_USERMASTER.displayname END AS userName, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_USERMASTER.description2 ELSE TBL_USERMASTER.description END AS deptName, IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL, '0', '1') AS gubun FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TBL_USERMASTER.DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox_%'
TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId#
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_USERMASTER.description2 ELSE TBL_USERMASTER.description END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_USERMASTER.displayname2 ELSE TBL_USERMASTER.displayname END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_USERMASTER.title2 ELSE TBL_USERMASTER.title END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) >= #searchStartTime#
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) <= #searchEndTime#
IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL, '0', '1') = #searchGubun#
ORDER BY
DISPLAYNAME TITLE DESCRIPTION WORKSTARTTIME GUBUN DESC,
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_USERMASTER.displayname2 ELSE TBL_USERMASTER.displayname END LIMIT #limit#, #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
TBL_USERMASTER.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
TBL_USERMASTER.displayname LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
TBL_USERMASTER.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) >= #searchStartTime#
IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((date_format(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) <= #searchEndTime#
IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL, '0', '1') = #searchGubun#

SELECT TYPE_ID AS typeId, COMPANY_ID AS companyId, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN TYPE_NAME2 ELSE TYPE_NAME END AS typeName, ISUSE AS isuse, IFNULL(PARENT_ID, '') AS parentId, FORM_ID AS formId, ISADD AS isAdd, IMG_PATH AS imgPath FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
ISUSE = #isuse#
PARENT_ID = 'A05'
TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A03', 'A05', 'A25')
#typeIdArr[]#
TYPE_ID IN ('A11', 'A12', 'A13', 'A21')
AND ISDEL = '0'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET ISUSE = #isuse# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TYPE_ID AS typeId, COMPANY_ID AS companyId, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, TYPE_NAME AS typeName, TYPE_NAME2 AS typeName2, ISUSE AS isuse, IFNULL(PARENT_ID,'') AS parentId, FORM_ID AS formId, ISADD AS isAdd FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
SELECT MAX(cast(substring(TYPE_ID,2) as unsigned)) + 1 AS MAXTYPEID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT FORM_ID, TENANT_ID, FORM_NAME, FORM_NAME2, FORM_HTML FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET TYPE_NAME = #typeName#, TYPE_NAME2 = #typeName2# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE (TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, PARENT_ID, ISADD, ISDEL, IMG_PATH, FORM_ID) VALUES (#typeId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #typeName#, #typeName2#, 'A05', '1', '0', 'refresh', (SELECT A.FORM_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TYPE_ID = 'A11'))

select.isEqual: SELECT IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workstarttime, IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5), SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5)) AS workendtime, IF(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime IS NULL OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime IS NULL, '0', '1') AS gubun FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #selectedUserId#

SELECT SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', work_starttime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5) AS workstarttime, SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(CONCAT((DATE_FORMAT(now(),'%Y-%m-%d')), ' ', work_endtime), INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12, 5) AS workendtime, '0' AS gubun FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT D.CN AS ID, IF(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 IS NULL
OR D.CN = #companyId#
, '##', D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1) AS PARENT, D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS COMPANYID, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME END AS TEXT, CASE D.CN WHEN D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 THEN 'COMP' ELSE 'DEPT' END AS ISCOMP, CASE D.CN WHEN U.DEPARTMENT THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END AS MYDEPT FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND NOT((D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 IS NULL OR D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = '') AND D.CN <> D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2)
AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME END

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END AS USER_NAME, CN AS USER_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TITLE2 ELSE TITLE END AS JIKWI, MAIL AS MAIL, DEPARTMENT AS DEPT_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DESCRIPTION2 ELSE DESCRIPTION END AS DEPT_NAME, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND CN not in (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
DISPLAYNAME CN DESCRIPTION TITLE TELEPHONENUMBER MOBILE HOMEPHONE FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER MAIL STREETADDRESS like concat('%', #value#, '%')
DEPARTMENT = #value#
UNION ALL SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME END AS USER_NAME, A.CN AS USER_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN B.TITLE2 ELSE B.TITLE END AS JIKWI, A.MAIL AS MAIL, B.DEPTID AS DEPT_ID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END AS DEPT_NAME, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG, CONCAT(SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - CHARACTER_LENGTH(IFNULL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))), IFNULL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0')) AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A on A.CN = B.CN and A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C on B.DEPTID = C.CN and B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
A.DISPLAYNAME A.CN A.DESCRIPTION A.TITLE A.TELEPHONENUMBER A.MOBILE A.HOMEPHONE A.FACSIMILETELEPHONENUMBER A.MAIL A.STREETADDRESS like concat('%', #value#, '%')
B.DEPTID = #value#
) AA ORDER BY 8 ASC, 1 ASC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF (user_id, tenant_id, work_starttime, work_endtime, company_id, dept_id) SELECT #selectedUserId# AS user_id, #tenantId# AS tenant_id, #workStartTime# AS work_starttime, #workEndTime# AS work_endtime, physicaldeliveryofficename AS company_id, department AS dept_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #selectedUserId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE work_starttime = #workStartTime#, work_endtime = #workEndTime#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
#selectedUserIdList[]#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF (user_id, tenant_id, work_starttime, work_endtime, company_id, dept_id) SELECT cn AS user_id, #tenantId# AS tenant_id, #workStartTime# AS work_starttime, #workEndTime# AS work_endtime, physicaldeliveryofficename AS company_id, department AS dept_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE department = #selectDeptId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE work_starttime = #workStartTime#, work_endtime = #workEndTime#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
#selectDeptId[]#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.attitude_id AS attitudeid, A.company_id AS companyid, A.tenant_id AS tenantid, A.writer_id AS writerid, A.dept_id AS deptid, if(A.type_id='A25', DATE_ADD(DATE_ADD(A.start_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), INTERVAL -1 day), DATE_ADD(A.start_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) ) as startdate, SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(A.start_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12) AS starttime, IFNULL(DATE_ADD(A.end_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute),'') AS enddate, IFNULL(SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(A.end_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 12),'') AS endtime, A.modappl, A.ip, A.date_type AS datetype, A.type_id AS typeid, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN B.type_name2 ELSE B.type_name END AS typename, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN C.displayname2 ELSE C.displayname END AS username, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN C.description2 ELSE C.description END AS deptname, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN C.title2 ELSE C.title END AS usertitle FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND ( (A.start_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.start_date <= #searchEndDate#) OR (A.end_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date < #searchEndDate#) OR (A.start_date < #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date >= #searchEndDate#) ) AND A.modappl <> 5
A.type_id in ('A03', 'A25')
A.type_id = #searchAttitudeType#
C.department = #searchDeptId#
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN C.description2 ELSE C.description END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN C.displayname2 ELSE C.displayname END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN C.title2 ELSE C.title END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
#deptIdList[]#
ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME TITLE DESCRIPTION START_DATE TYPE_NAME DESC, date_format(startdate, '%Y-%m-%d') DESC, username, enddate DESC, starttime DESC
ORDER BY date_format(startdate, '%Y-%m-%d') DESC, username, enddate DESC, starttime DESC
LIMIT #limit#, #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND ( (A.start_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.start_date <= #searchEndDate#) OR (A.end_date >= #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date < #searchEndDate#) OR (A.start_date < #searchStartDate# AND A.end_date >= #searchEndDate#) ) AND A.modappl <> 5
A.type_id in ('A03', 'A25')
A.type_id = #searchAttitudeType#
C.DEPARTMENT = #searchDeptId#
C.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
C.displayname LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
C.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
#deptIdList[]#

SELECT A.cn AS writerid, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.displayname2 ELSE A.displayname END AS username, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.description2 ELSE A.description END AS deptname, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.title2 ELSE A.title END AS usertitle, A.mail AS useremail, SUBSTR(DATE_ADD(#searchStartDate#, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), 1, 10) as startdate FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_ATTITUDE C WHERE C.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND C.company_id = #companyId# AND ( ( date_add(C.start_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #searchStartDate# AND date_add(C.start_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #searchEndDate#) OR ( date_add(C.end_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #searchStartDate# AND date_add(C.end_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #searchEndDate#) OR ( date_add(C.start_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #searchStartDate# AND date_add(C.end_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #searchEndDate#) )) B ON A.cn = B.writer_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND A.department not like 'shared\_mailbox\_%' AND A.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND B.start_date IS NULL
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.description2 ELSE A.description END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.displayname2 ELSE A.displayname END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.title2 ELSE A.title END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
A.department = #searchDeptId#
#deptIdList[]#

SELECT A.USER_ID AS userId, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN B.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE B.DISPLAYNAME END AS userName, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN B.TITLE2 ELSE B.TITLE END AS jikwi, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN B.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE B.DESCRIPTION END AS deptName, group_concat(A.AUTH_DEPT_ID order by CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END) AS authDeptId, group_concat(CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END order by CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END) AS authDeptName, group_concat(A.AUTH_TYPE order by CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN C.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE C.DISPLAYNAME END) AS authType FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.AUTH_DEPT_ID = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY A.USER_ID ORDER BY userName
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USER_ID = #selectUserId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS deptName, D.CN AS deptId, 'no' AS mine, A.AUTH_TYPE AS authType FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D INNER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A ON D.CN = A.AUTH_DEPT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS deptName, D.CN AS deptId, 'yes' AS mine, '' AS authType FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.CN = U.DEPARTMENT AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS deptName, D.CN AS deptId, 'yes' AS mine, '' AS authType FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER AD ON D.CN = AD.DEPTID AND D.TENANT_ID = AD.TENANT_ID WHERE AD.CN = #userId# AND AD.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) T ORDER BY deptName

select.isEqual:
SELECT CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'no' AS mine, 'M' AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%' AND cn != (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) UNION
SELECT CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'yes' AS mine, 'M' AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%' AND cn = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) ORDER BY deptName

SELECT CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME END AS deptname, TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AS deptid, 'no' AS mine, TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_dept_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AND TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.tenant_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id WHERE TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.user_id = #userId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%' AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn != (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#)
TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type = 'M'
UNION SELECT CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'yes' AS mine, 'M' AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%' AND cn = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId#
AND TBL_USERMASTER.extensionattribute1 like '%g=1%'
AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) UNION SELECT CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME END AS deptname, D.CN AS dept_id, 'add' AS mine, 'M' AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D RIGHT JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON (D.CN = A.DEPTID and A.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.CN = #userId# AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND A.ROLL_INFO like '%g=1%'
ORDER BY deptname

SELECT CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME END AS deptname, TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AS deptid, 'no' AS mine, TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_dept_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AND TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.tenant_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id WHERE TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.user_id = #userId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%' AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn != (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#)
TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type = 'M'
UNION SELECT CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'yes' AS mine, IFNULL((SELECT A.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A WHERE A.auth_dept_id = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) AND A.user_id = #userId#), 'R') AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND CN NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%' AND cn = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) UNION SELECT CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME END AS deptname, D.CN AS dept_id, 'add' AS mine, IFNULL((SELECT A.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A WHERE A.auth_dept_id = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) AND A.user_id = #userId#), 'R') AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D RIGHT JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON (D.CN = A.DEPTID and A.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.CN = #userId# AND D.CN NOT LIKE 'shared_mailbox%' AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY deptname

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH (USER_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, AUTH_DEPT_ID, AUTH_TYPE) VALUES (#selectUserId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #deptId#, #deptAuth#)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT ifnull(SUM(to_days( IF( date_add(A.END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > date_format(#endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_format(#endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_add(IFNULL(A.END_DATE, A.START_DATE), INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) - to_days( IF( date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < date_format(#startDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_format(#startDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T'), date_add(A.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) ) + COUNT(A.TYPE_ID), 0) AS COUNT FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.TYPE_ID = #typeId# AND A.MODAPPL <> '5' AND A.WRITER_ID NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
AND A.WRITER_ID = #userId#
AND A.DEPT_ID = #deptId#
AND ( (A.START_DATE >= date_format(#startDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.START_DATE <= date_format(#endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T')) or (A.END_DATE >= date_format(#startDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.END_DATE < date_format(#endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T')) or (A.START_DATE < date_format(#startDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T') and A.END_DATE >= date_format(#endDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %T')) )

SELECT CN AS deptId, CASE #lang# WHEN '1' THEN DISPLAYNAME ELSE DISPLAYNAME2 END AS deptName
'M' AS authType
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# ORDER BY deptName
SELECT COUNT(attitude_id) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND type_id = #typeId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET isdel = '1' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND type_id = #typeId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT attitude_id AS attitudeId, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN writer_name2 ELSE writer_name END AS writerName, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN writer_title2 ELSE writer_title END AS writerTitle, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN writer_dept_name2 ELSE writer_dept_name END AS writerDeptName, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(origin_startdate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS originstartdate, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(origin_enddate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS originenddate, IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(change_startdate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),'') AS changestartdate, IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(change_enddate, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),'') AS changeenddate, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN origin_type_name2 ELSE origin_type_name END AS origintypename, IFNULL(CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN change_type_name2 ELSE change_type_name END, '') AS changetypename, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN appr_user_name2 ELSE appr_user_name END AS apprusername, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(appr_date, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS apprdate FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL_HISTORY WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND (appr_date >= #searchStartDate# AND appr_date <= #searchEndDate#)
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN writer_name2 ELSE writer_name END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN writer_title2 ELSE writer_title END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
WRITER_DEPT_ID = #deptId#
#deptIdList[]#
ORDER BY WRITER_NAME WRITER_TITLE WRITER_DEPT_NAME CHANGE_STARTDATE CHANGE_TYPE_NAME APPR_USER_NAME APPR_DATE DESC
ORDER BY changestartdate DESC, writerName
LIMIT #limit#, #listSize#

SELECT count(*) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL_HISTORY WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (appr_date >= #searchStartDate# AND appr_date <= #searchEndDate#) AND writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
WRITER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
WRITER_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
WRITER_DEPT_ID = #deptId#
#deptIdList[]#

SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_usermaster A LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_attitude_annual B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND A.DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.description2 ELSE A.description END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.displayname2 ELSE A.displayname END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.title2 ELSE A.title END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')

SELECT A.CN AS userId, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME END AS userName, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.TITLE2 ELSE A.TITLE END AS userTitle, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE A.DESCRIPTION END AS userDeptName, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS companyId, ifnull( ( SELECT CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_HISTORY E WHERE E.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND E.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND E.USER_ID = A.CN AND ( date_add(E.CHANGE_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #searchStartTime# AND date_add(E.CHANGE_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #searchEndTime# ) ORDER BY E.CHANGE_DATE DESC, E.ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID DESC LIMIT 1 ), 0) AS basicAnnualCnt, IFNULL((SUM(to_days( IF( date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > #searchEndTime#, #searchEndTime#, date_add(IFNULL(C.END_DATE, C.START_DATE), INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) - to_days( IF( date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < #searchStartTime#, #searchStartTime#, date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) ) + SUM( CASE WHEN C.TYPE_ID = 'A11' THEN 1 WHEN C.TYPE_ID = 'A12' THEN 0.5 WHEN C.TYPE_ID = 'A13' THEN 0.5 WHEN C.TYPE_ID = 'A21' THEN 0.25 ELSE 0 END ) ), 0) as useAnnualCnt, ifnull(B.ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) as additionalAnnualCnt, ifnull(DATE_FORMAT(B.JOIN_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d'), 0) AS joinDate FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE C ON (A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = C.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = C.WRITER_ID AND C.TYPE_ID IN ('A11', 'A12', 'A13', 'A21') AND C.MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( ( date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #searchStartTime# AND date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #searchEndTime# ) OR ( date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #searchStartTime# AND date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #searchEndTime# ) OR ( date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #searchStartTime# AND date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #searchEndTime# ) ) ) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND A.CN IN (select CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#) AND A.DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE A.DESCRIPTION END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.TITLE2 ELSE A.TITLE END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
GROUP BY A.CN
ORDER BY DISPLAYNAME TITLE DESCRIPTION JOINDATE BASICANNUALCNT ADDITIONALANNUALCNT USEANNUALCNT DESC
ORDER BY userName
LIMIT #limit#, #listSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
USER_ID = #userId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_HISTORY (USER_ID, ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_REASON, CHANGE_DATE, CHANGE_USER_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) SELECT A.CN AS USER_ID, (IFNULL(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + IFNULL(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + IFNULL(B.ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0)) AS ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT,
(IFNULL(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + IFNULL(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0)) AS CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT,
(IFNULL(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + IFNULL(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + #annualCnt#) AS CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT,
#changeReason# AS CHANGE_REASON, NOW() AS CHANGE_DATE, #changeUserId# AS CHANGE_USER_ID, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND A.CN = #userId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_HISTORY A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID SET CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT = (IFNULL(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + IFNULL(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0)) WHERE A.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_annual_history (USER_ID, ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_REASON, CHANGE_DATE, CHANGE_USER_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) SELECT USER_ID AS USER_ID,
ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT + MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT + ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT - #annualCnt# AS ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT, MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT + ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT + ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT AS CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT,
MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT + ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT + ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT AS ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT, '0' AS CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT,
#changeReason# AS CHANGE_REASON, NOW() AS CHANGE_DATE, #changeUserId# AS CHANGE_USER_ID, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM tbl_attitude_annual WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USER_ID = #userId#

INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_annual (USER_ID, ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) SELECT CN AS USER_ID, #annualCnt# AS TOTAL_ANNUAL_CNT, physicaldeliveryofficename AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
CN = #userId#

UPDATE tbl_attitude_annual SET ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT = #annualCnt# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
USER_ID = #userId#

INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_annual (USER_ID, MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, JOIN_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) SELECT CN AS USER_ID, #annualCnt# AS MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, '0' AS ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, '0' AS ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, #joinDate# AS JOIN_DATE, physicaldeliveryofficename AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
CN = #userId#

UPDATE tbl_attitude_annual SET MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT = #annualCnt#, ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT = 0, ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT = 0, JOIN_DATE = #joinDate# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
USER_ID = #userId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.cn AS userId, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME END AS userName, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.TITLE2 ELSE A.TITLE END AS userTitle, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE A.DESCRIPTION END AS deptName, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as imgPath, date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) as startDate, date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) as endDate, C.TYPE_ID as typeId, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN D.TYPE_NAME2 ELSE D.TYPE_NAME END AS typeName, C.ATTITUDE_ID as attitudeId, C.CONTENT as content, C.MODAPPL as modAppl, ifnull(F.ANNUAL_APPR_STATUS, -1) as annualApprStatus, IFNULL(((to_days( IF( date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > #endTime#, #endTime#, date_add(IFNULL(C.END_DATE, C.START_DATE), INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) - to_days( IF( date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < #startTime#, #startTime#, date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) )) + (CASE WHEN C.TYPE_ID = 'A11' THEN 1 WHEN C.TYPE_ID = 'A12' THEN 0.5 WHEN C.TYPE_ID = 'A13' THEN 0.5 WHEN C.TYPE_ID = 'A21' THEN 0.25 ELSE 0 END) ), 0) as annualCnt, ifnull( ( SELECT CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_HISTORY E WHERE E.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND E.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND E.USER_ID = #userId# AND ( date_add(E.CHANGE_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startTime# AND date_add(E.CHANGE_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #endTime# ) ORDER BY E.CHANGE_DATE DESC, E.ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID DESC LIMIT 1 ) , 0) as totalAnnualCnt, ifnull( ( SELECT FUNCTIONTYPE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO G WHERE F.ANNUAL_DOC_ID = G.DOCID OR F.ANNUAL_DOC_ID = G.ORGDOCID ORDER BY G.DOCID DESC LIMIT 1 ) , 0) as docApprStatus FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE C ON (A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = C.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = C.WRITER_ID) AND (C.TYPE_ID = 'A11' OR C.TYPE_ID = 'A12' OR C.TYPE_ID = 'A13' OR C.TYPE_ID = 'A21') AND C.MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( ( date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startTime# AND date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #endTime# ) OR ( date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #startTime# AND date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #endTime# ) OR ( date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #startTime# AND date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #endTime# ) ) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE D ON (A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = D.COMPANY_ID AND C.TYPE_ID = D.TYPE_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_APR_CONN F ON (A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = F.COMPANY_ID AND C.ATTITUDE_ID = F.ATTITUDE_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND A.cn = #userId#
ORDER BY STARTDATE TYPENAME ANNUALCNT ANNUALAPPRSTATUS MODAPPL DESC
ORDER BY START_DATE, TYPENAME, CONTENT

SELECT A.CN AS userId, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE A.DISPLAYNAME END AS userName, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.TITLE2 ELSE A.TITLE END AS userTitle, CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN A.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE A.DESCRIPTION END AS userDeptName, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS companyId, (ifnull(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + ifnull(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + ifnull(B.ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0)) AS totalAnnualCnt, IFNULL((SUM(to_days( IF( date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) > #searchEndTime#, #searchEndTime#, date_add(IFNULL(C.END_DATE, C.START_DATE), INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) - to_days( IF( date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) < #searchStartTime#, #searchStartTime#, date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL +#offsetMin# minute) ) ) ) + SUM( CASE WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A11' THEN 1 WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A12' THEN 0.5 WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A13' THEN 0.5 ELSE 0 END ) ), 0) as useAnnualCnt, B.JOIN_DATE AS joinDate FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE C ON (A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = C.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = C.WRITER_ID AND C.TYPE_ID IN ('A11', 'A12', 'A13', 'A21') AND C.MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( ( date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #searchStartTime# AND date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) <= #searchEndTime# ) OR ( date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #searchStartTime# AND date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #searchEndTime# ) OR ( date_add(C.START_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) < #searchStartTime# AND date_add(C.END_DATE, INTERVAL #offsetMin# minute) >= #searchEndTime# ) ) ) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND A.CN = #userId#
GROUP BY A.CN

SELECT USER_ID AS USER_ID, ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT AS ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT AS CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_REASON AS CHANGE_REASON, DATE_FORMAT(CHANGE_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %T') AS CHANGE_DATE, CHANGE_USER_ID AS CHANGE_USER_ID, (SELECT CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE DISPLAYNAME END FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE CN = CHANGE_USER_ID AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AS CHANGE_USER_NAME, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM tbl_attitude_annual_history WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USER_ID = #userId# ORDER BY CHANGE_DATE DESC, ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID DESC

SELECT CN AS USER_ID, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, 0 AS JOIN_DATE FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.DEPARTMENT NOT LIKE 'shared\_mailbox\_%'
CN = #userId#
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN description2 ELSE description END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchDeptName#, '%')
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN displayname2 ELSE displayname END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchUserName#, '%')
CASE #primary# WHEN '2' THEN title2 ELSE title END LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchTitle#, '%')
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_annual (USER_ID, JOIN_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#userId#, #date#, #companyId#, #tenantId#)
UPDATE tbl_attitude_annual SET JOIN_DATE = #date# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USER_ID = #userId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT company_id, tenant_id, annual_cancel_rule, use_annual_auto_gnrt, annual_gnrt_std, DATE_FORMAT(initial_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS initial_date, use_minus_annual, use_annual_tmnt, round_off_rule, DATE_FORMAT(conf_set_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS conf_set_date FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF ( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, ANNUAL_CANCEL_RULE, USE_ANNUAL_AUTO_GNRT, ANNUAL_GNRT_STD, INITIAL_DATE, USE_MINUS_ANNUAL, USE_ANNUAL_TMNT, ROUND_OFF_RULE, CONF_SET_DATE ) VALUES ( #companyId#, #tenantId#, #annualCancelRule#, #useAnnualAutoGnrt#, #annualGnrtStd#, #initialDate#, #useMinusAnnual#, #useAnnualTmnt#, #roundOffRule#, str_to_date(#confSetDate#, '%Y-%m-%d') )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF SET annual_cancel_rule = #annualCancelRule#, use_annual_auto_gnrt = #useAnnualAutoGnrt#, annual_gnrt_std = #annualGnrtStd#, initial_date = #initialDate#, use_minus_annual = #useMinusAnnual#, use_annual_tmnt = #useAnnualTmnt#, round_off_rule = #roundOffRule#, conf_set_date = str_to_date(#confSetDate#, '%Y-%m-%d') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CN AS USER_ID, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(B.JOIN_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d'), IFNULL((SELECT CONCAT(YEAR(START_DATE),'-01-01') FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE COMPANY_ID = A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AND TENANT_ID = A.TENANT_ID AND WRITER_ID = A.CN ORDER BY START_DATE ASC LIMIT 1),0)) AS JOIN_DATE FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND A.CN = #userId#
